creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
Version: 11.0-RELEASE-p7

For the first stage compiler I guess it's the default freebsd compiler, clang

Error message with the next line:
In file included from /usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/gcc5/work/gcc-5.4.0/libcpp/charset.c:20:0:
./config.h:350:19: error: multiple types in one declaration
 #define ptrdiff_t int
                   ^
./config.h:350:19: error: declaration does not declare anything [-fpermissive]
gmake[5]: *** [Makefile:224: charset.o] Error 1
gmake[5]: Leaving directory '/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/gcc5/work/.build/libcpp'
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:7913: all-stage2-libcpp] Error 2
gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/gcc5/work/.build'
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:21208: stage2-bubble] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/gcc5/work/.build'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:21423: bootstrap-lean] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/obj/usr/ports/lang/gcc5/work/.build'
*** Error code 1
